# Lab01Submission — Generated Submission Package

This folder is generated by the Finish Lab prompt.

**Students normally do not edit this folder manually.**
Use `make package LAB=Lab01` or the Finish Lab prompt to regenerate.

## Contents

| File | Created by | Purpose |
|------|-----------|---------|
| `submission.md` | You (with Claude's help) | Your written reflection on the lab |
| `status.json` | `make package` | Machine-readable package status |
| `evidence_manifest.json` | `make package` | List of evidence files and their status |

## GitHub Actions

GitHub Actions checks this folder on every push.
See `.github/workflows/grade-submissions.yml` for the grading logic.

## To regenerate

```bash
make package LAB=Lab01
```
